subject: Microsoft Teams camera not available in meeting
description: Teams meeting shows no camera or black preview; Camera app works on same PC.

ts_steps.title: Teams device settings
ts_steps.action: Teams → Settings → Devices — select correct camera; test preview; fully quit Teams and relaunch.

ts_steps.title: Privacy camera
ts_steps.action: Settings → Privacy & security → Camera — allow desktop apps and Teams specifically.

ts_steps.title: Driver rollback
ts_steps.action: Device Manager — imaging devices — update or roll back driver if issue began after update.

internal_information: Teams cache vs driver. Clear Teams cache per Microsoft guidance if policy allows. Hardware swap last resort.
